note: Fictional sidecar for the public showcase. The consideration set is extracted from the measured category answers, then each candidate is gated by a same-category check; only in-category names count toward share-of-voice. Competitors named are real public companies used only as market context.

judgments.name: Circle
judgments.reason: Stablecoin issuer with a payouts/payments network; direct alternative

judgments.name: Bridge
judgments.reason: Stablecoin orchestration and payouts API; direct alternative

judgments.name: Stripe
judgments.reason: Offers stablecoin payouts within its payments suite

judgments.name: Fireblocks
judgments.reason: Enterprise digital-asset infra with payments rails

judgments.name: Coinbase
judgments.reason: Offers business stablecoin payouts via its platform

judgments.name: MoonPay
judgments.reason: Consumer on/off-ramp, not a payouts API for platforms

judgments.name: Chainlink
judgments.reason: Oracle infrastructure, not a payments provider
